title: Quieter Thunder
description: Lowers the volume of thunder during Thunderstorms.
body:
# Introduction
Tired of the ear-piercing Thunder? Well, this Resource Pack lowers the volume of Thunder!

While this Resource Pack is intended for older versions, it can be used in newer versions of Minecraft.

# Information
✅ Thunder volume is reduced. ✅

⚠️ **Free to use in Modpacks when credited.** ⚠️

ℹ️ _As of [1.21.9](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-java-edition-1-21-9#:~:text=Thunder%20volume%20is%20not%20affected%20by%20weather%20volume%20settings), Thunder not being affected by the Weather volume settings, has been fixed. If you exclusively play on newer versions of Minecraft, you do not need this Resource Pack._ ℹ️
